summary: Today's sweep leans toward Democracy / anti-fascism, Democracy / press freedom, AI / computing. The strongest items in this run are Democrats vow to fight Trump’s ‘morally bankrupt’ request for billions in additional defense and DHS spending– live, Middle East crisis live: one crew member rescued from US fighter jet shot down by Iran as its army claims it downed second US plane, and OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security.
